creator: msl0000023508@gmail.com
text: I found another pollution in both security/openssl and security/openssl111. /usr/local/man/man5/config.5.gz polluted config(5) in base system /usr/share/man/man5/config.5.gz. Since OpenSSL configuration file is named 'openssl.cnf' by default, this man page should be named as openssl(5) or openssl.cnf(5).
